zh.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton是Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton的女兒，於1144年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。她和Sir Michael le Fleming II至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1220年之前在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton是Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton的女儿，于1144年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。她和Sir Michael le Fleming II至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1220年之前在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stainton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and northern England): habitational name from any of various places called Stainton, including Stainton by Langworth, Market Stainton, and Stainton le Vale (all Lincolnshire), Stainton Dale (North Yorkshire), and Stainton (Cumberland, Durham, Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Westmorland, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire). The placenames derive either from Old Norse steinn ‘stone, rock’ or from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’, later replaced by Old Norse steinn, + Old English tūn. The name was probably sometimes confused with or absorbed by Stanton .

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton was born in 1144, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Michael le Fleming II. She died before 1220, in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton est née en 1144, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Michael le Fleming II. Elle est décédée avant 1220, à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton wurde 1144 in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Michael le Fleming II mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1220 in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton è nata il nel 1144 nel Kendal, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Michael le Fleming II. Morì prima del 1220, nel Aldingham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian de Staintonは1144年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルでSir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Staintonの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Michael le Fleming IIとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1220年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton(은)는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Michael le Fleming II(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 알딩함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton nasceu em 1144, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Michael le Fleming II. Ela faleceu antes 1220, em Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton родилась в 1144 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Sir Michael le Fleming II. Она умерла перед 1220 г. в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Christian de Stainton nació en 1144, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Gilbert de Lancaster, Lord of Stainton. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Michael le Fleming II. Murió antes de 1220, en Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
